ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XS, S, M) */,
  "bust_cm_min" REAL /* Minimum bust measurement in centimeters */,
  "bust_cm_max" REAL /* Maximum bust measurement in centimeters */,
  "waist_cm_min" REAL /* Minimum waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "waist_cm_max" REAL /* Maximum waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "hip_cm_min" REAL /* Minimum hip measurement in centimeters */,
  "hip_cm_max" REAL /* Maximum hip measurement in centimeters */,
  "clothing_size_range" TEXT /* Range of clothing sizes (e.g., 6-8, 8-10) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size (e.g., petite, tall) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the product was added to the inventory */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of product (e.g., top, bottom, dress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Women's Apparel, Men's Apparel) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand logo */,
  "brand_website" TEXT /* URL to the brand website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variations" (
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product variation */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the variation belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the variation */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the color of the variation */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the variation in stock */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) of the variation */,
  "barcode" TEXT /* Barcode of the variation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variations_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variations_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_id") REFERENCES colors ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the color (e.g., Red, Blue) */,
  "hex_code" TEXT /* Hex code of the color */,
  "color_description" TEXT /* Description of the color */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loyalty program the customer belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_loyalty_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("loyalty_program_id") REFERENCES loyalty_programs ("loyalty_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer profile */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer the profile belongs to */,
  "bust_cm" REAL /* Bust measurement of the customer in centimeters */,
  "waist_cm" REAL /* Waist measurement of the customer in centimeters */,
  "hip_cm" REAL /* Hip measurement of the customer in centimeters */,
  "preferred_size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the preferred size of the customer */,
  "fit_preference" TEXT /* Fit preference of the customer (e.g., loose, tight) */,
  "purchase_history" TEXT /* Purchase history of the customer (e.g., list of purchased products) */,
  "body_type" TEXT /* Body type of the customer (e.g., petite, tall, plus size) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_profiles_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_profiles_preferred_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product of the item */,
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the variation of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in the order */,
  "price_per_unit" REAL /* Price per unit of the item */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_variation_id FOREIGN KEY ("variation_id") REFERENCES product_variations ("variation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order the return belongs to */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the item was returned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return (e.g., wrong size, damaged) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "return_reason_code" TEXT /* Return reason code (e.g., size issue, quality issue) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES order_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the return the exchange belongs to */,
  "new_item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the new item being exchanged */,
  "exchange_date" TEXT /* Date the exchange was processed */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the exchange (e.g., wrong size, different color) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the exchange (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "exchange_reason_code" TEXT /* Exchange reason code (e.g., size issue, color issue) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchanges_return_id FOREIGN KEY ("return_id") REFERENCES returns ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchanges_new_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("new_item_id") REFERENCES order_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loyalty program */,
  "points_per_purchase" INTEGER /* Number of points earned per purchase */,
  "points_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the points expire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, manager, customer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_orders, manage_inventory) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the warehouse */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the warehouse */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the warehouse */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the warehouse */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse the inventory belongs to */,
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product variation the inventory belongs to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product variation in stock */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Reorder point for the product variation */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the product variation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_variation_id FOREIGN KEY ("variation_id") REFERENCES product_variations ("variation_id")
)
